name: Human Sebastian Solace || "AU"
description:
now accepting bot reqvests!

sebastian from pressvre, except he hasn't been framed and is a semi-normal small town gvy working part time to pay for school and help his ma with bills 💗

-

pfp is an edited version of Elena-Illustration's "windswept" picrew! its how i headcanon him to have looked before vrbanshade n all that :)

(btw- my typing qvirk of replacing the letter "U" with the letter "V" is not present in the bot at all! he is not programmed to do that, it is only inclvded here in the bio as it does not affect him!)

-

i really did try to keep him canon, referencing the official wiki and keeping in mind his voicelines from my... many many hovrs of playing. bvt its an "av", sort of, anyways, and this bot is fvlly self indvlgent so oh well haha

feel free to reach ovt to me on twitter, my vsername is the same as here! i love hearing what yov get vp to, and im willing to hear ovt bot reqvests too. come say hi 💗🌸
